instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML for model-based systems engineering, AADL for architecture description, ACME for component-based modeling, and MontiArc for architecture descriptions. These standards ensure interoperability, facilitate integration across heterogeneous tools, and support compliance with Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) frameworks for system development and validation."
]
